title: Chems' Guns
description: A large, expansive gun mod/datapack with over 65+ brand new weapons to blow stuff up with!
body:
![Chems' Guns Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9853e532b6a809c5d414d40eed2b4fbaf4461cc1.png) [![Gun Core dependency decorative image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d5cca0e504d6d4c12c05642e2f5e6ab43dbf04a.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core) *Chems' Guns requires [Gun Core](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core/versions)!*
Spoiler *Chems' Guns is an addon for [Gamingbarn's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamingbarns-guns/versions)/[Gun Core](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core/versions) designed and developed by the World of Tanks YouTuber [Chems](https://www.youtube.com/@chems). Most models+textures and many sounds were created soley by him. The project, originally developed for Minecraft 1.21.3, has been ported to newer versions by [yours truely](https://modrinth.com/user/Gamingbarn). I will also update the project to newer versions as they release. All promotional media and assets have been created by myself.*
Chems' Guns adds over 65 brand, new guns to vanilla Minecraft! Over eight tiers of guns, with categories ranging from pistols, ARs, SMGs, Shotguns, to even Tesla Cannons and Seige Bombardment! Chems' Guns gives players countless new ways defend your property, fend off zombies, and destroy the known world!|![Four of the guns added by Chems' Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fde7d1e9cc539a3f50eaca5390c372b73e4f2ba2_0.webp) ---|--- ![A player holding a powerful explosive weapon, flanked by two other weapons of mass descruction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83376ca454b8885a69b9a1806100e1dabbd7d407.png)|**For players with lots of time on their hands, or those who are committed to total world domination, there is an expansive array of highly expensive and highly descructive weaponry. Chems' Guns adds several new bosses that must first be conquered in order to attain some of these weapons. Once obtained, the world is your oyster!**| **The gun library isn't limited *just* to expensive, powerfully descrutive weapons of war. New players with very little resources can craft a large array of cheap firearms. Don't be worried, however, as these guns can still pack a punch and give an awesome experience!**|![Four other guns added by Chems' Guns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f8af8500c151cdc538b92f088677956fd75c952.png) ![The recipe book from Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a993b689a7a39c6257a7e9ba9ee4023a46109467.png)|**All guns, ammunition, and other items added by this pack can be crafted in the vanilla crafting table! You can search for terms like "Pistol" or "Tier 3" to search for specific types and tiers of guns. Additionally, all items added by this datapack can be obtained through the given functions:** `/function give:`**.** *You can make your own pack just like this by using the [Gun Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/GunGenerator) and [Ammo Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/AmmoGenerator) from gamingbarn.net!* > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server? Consider SparkedHost! Use code GAMINGBARN for 25% off! > [![Discord Promotional Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6dc9d56feee16e94cb60cccde0087803114ac61.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg](https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg)) >
***https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg***
> Need help with my datapacks? Found a bug? Want to share some feedback? Join my Discord server! There, I can offer personal help towards any problem you may be having!
